input.command:
python3 << 'PY'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os

src = '/home/user/rork-app/expo/assets/images/ivx-logo.png'
out_base = '/home/user/rork-app/android-ivx-holdings/app/src/main/res'

sizes = {
    'mipmap-mdpi': 48,
    'mipmap-hdpi': 72,
    'mipmap-xhdpi': 96,
    'mipmap-xxhdpi': 144,
    'mipmap-xxxhdpi': 192,
}

# Dark background matching the app theme
bg_color = (0x0A, 0x0A, 0x0F)

logo = Image.open(src).convert('RGBA')

for folder, size in sizes.items():
    path = os.path.join(out_base, folder)
    os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Square launcher icon
    img = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), bg_color)
    
    # Fit logo inside with padding
    padding = size // 6
    fit = size - 2 * padding
    resized = logo.copy()
    resized.thumbnail((fit, fit), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
    
    x = (size - resized.width) // 2
    y = (size - resized.height) // 2
    img.paste(resized, (x, y), resized)
    
    # Save as PNG (some OEM launchers prefer PNG over WebP for launcher icons)
    img.save(os.path.join(path, 'ic_launcher.png'), 'PNG')
    img.save(os.path.join(path, 'ic_launcher_round.png'), 'PNG')
    print(f'Generated {folder}/{size}x{size}')

print('Done')
PY
